about.title: Authentic Brazilian flavours crafted with fire and passion
about.body: At BRAVO, skewers move from open flame to your table with bold aroma, coarse salt, and slow-roasted heat. Gather for a generous buffet, premium grilled cuts, fresh sides, and a warm dining room made for families, friends, and celebrations.

dishes.title: Dishes that keep guests coming back

experience.title: Grilling, carved hot from the skewer
experience.body: Our churrasco service is built around theatre and generosity. Cuts are seasoned simply, grilled with patience, and served fresh at the table so every guest can taste the heat, smoke, and tenderness at its peak.

specials.title: What's On at BRAVO
specials.body: From daily lunch deals to private event packages - something for every occasion.

items.title: Lunch Buffet
items.copy: All-you-can-eat churrasco + full buffet bar. Unlimited grill cuts carved tableside from 11:00 AM.

items.title: Weekend Family Table
items.copy: Bring the whole family. Special group pricing on weekends - perfect for large tables and celebrations.

items.title: Private Dining
items.copy: Birthdays, corporate dinners, romantic dates. We close off the space and set everything up for you.

items.title: Party of 10+
items.copy: Booking a big group? Ask about our group packages with fixed menus, drinks, and reserved seating.

testimonials.title: Dinner that feels like a celebration

reservation.title: Reserve your table today
reservation.body: Bring your guests to the flame. Book a table for churrasco, celebrations, family dinners, and nights built around bold Brazilian steakhouse flavor.
reservation.imageTitle: Hot skewers, cold drinks, full tables

details.label: Quick booking
details.value: Choose your date and party size
